_comment: French locale - NIR, IBAN FR76, Numero fiscal, SIRET
sitReference:
=== MANDATORY DATA FORMAT RULES (follow EXACTLY) ===

These patterns match Microsoft Purview Sensitive Information Type (SIT) detection rules.
Following them ensures HIGH CONFIDENCE (85%) detection in DLP policies and auto-labeling.

FRENCH NIR (numero de securite sociale / INSEE):
- Format: exactly 15 consecutive digits OR 13 digits + space + 2 digits
- Structure: S AA MM DDD CCC NNN KK (sex, birth year, month, dept, commune, order, checksum)
- MUST include a keyword within 300 characters: "numero de securite sociale", "NIR", "code secu"
- Examples: 2 85 07 75 123 456 78, 185077512345678
- Generate 3-8 different values per document.

FRENCH IBAN:
- Format: FR76 + 23 alphanumeric characters (total 27 chars)
- No keyword needed (detected by pattern only at 85% confidence)
- Examples: FR76 3000 6000 0112 3456 7890 189
- Always start with FR76.

FRENCH TAX ID (numero d'identification fiscale / SPI):
- Format: exactly 13 digits, first digit must be 0, 1, 2, or 3
- MUST include keyword: "numero d'identification fiscale", "numero fiscal", "SPI"
- Examples: 0 12 34 567 890 12

EU DEBIT CARD NUMBER:
- Format: 16 digits (groups of 4)
- Include keyword: "carte bancaire", "carte de debit"
- Examples: 4532 0123 4567 8901

FRENCH PHONE: 06 XX XX XX XX or 07 XX XX XX XX
EMAIL: prenom.nom@corplab.fr
NAMES: Use realistic French names

primaryId.name: NIR
primaryId.format: X XX XX XX XXX XXX XX

bankAccount.name: IBAN
bankAccount.format: FR76 XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX

HR.Prompt: Generate a monthly payroll CSV with semicolons: Employe;NIR;IBAN;Salaire_Brut;Date. Include 6-10 rows of fake French employees.
Generate a confidential employee file with full name, NIR (numero de securite sociale), IBAN FR76, annual salary, home address in France, start date.
Generate an onboarding checklist for a new employee with their NIR, IBAN FR76 for salary, manager name, equipment list.
Generate an absence report CSV: Employe;Type;Debut;Fin;NIR. Include 5-8 rows with sick leave, vacation, etc.
Generate a DPAE (Declaration Prealable a Embauche) with employee NIR, birth date, IBAN FR76, contract type (CDI/CDD).
Generate an annual performance review with employee name, NIR, objectives, salary discussion, IBAN FR76 for bonus.
Generate a personnel register extract: Nom;Prenom;NIR;Date_Entree;Poste;IBAN;Salaire. 8-12 rows.

Finance.Prompt: Generate a supplier payment CSV: Fournisseur;IBAN;Montant;Devise;Reference. Include 6-8 French suppliers with IBAN FR76.
Generate a quarterly financial report in French with revenue, costs, treasury IBAN FR76, EU VAT number.
Generate a DSN (Declaration Sociale Nominative) CSV: Employe;NIR;Net_Imposable;Prelevement;IBAN. 5-8 rows.
Generate an expense report in French with employee name, reimbursement IBAN FR76, itemized expenses, total in EUR.
Generate a budget forecast in French with salary costs, treasury IBAN FR76, department breakdowns, total amounts in EUR.
Generate an invoice in French with supplier details, IBAN FR76 for payment, TVA intracommunautaire FR, line items, total HT/TTC.

Legal.Prompt: Generate a CNIL compliance audit report listing 4-6 persons with their NIR (numero de securite sociale), findings, and corrective actions.
Generate a French employment contract (CDI) with employee NIR, IBAN FR76, salary in EUR, working hours, probation period.
Generate a GDPR/RGPD processing register entry for payroll: data types (NIR,IBAN), legal basis, retention period.
Generate a litigation file summary with plaintiff NIR, claimed amount in EUR, case timeline, settlement IBAN FR76.
Generate a legal opinion memo about data protection compliance referencing specific employee NIR found in breach.
Generate an NDA document in French with party names, addresses, confidential information description, penalty amounts in EUR.

Sales.Prompt: Generate a sales pipeline CSV: Client;Contact;Email;IBAN;Montant_Contrat. Include 5-8 French prospects.
Generate a commercial proposal in French with client details, contact email, payment IBAN FR76, quote amount in EUR HT/TTC.
Generate a commission report CSV: Commercial;Client;CA;Commission;IBAN_Commission. 4-6 rows.
Generate client meeting notes in French with attendees, client budget in EUR, next steps, IBAN FR76 for advance payment.
Generate a prospect list in French with company names, contact person, email, phone (06XXXXXXXX), estimated contract value in EUR.
Generate an RFP response in French with company credentials, proposed pricing in EUR, bank details (IBAN FR76), references.
